notes: v0.16.36 — Phase 9/9: RIFTS polish + balance. MINI-BOSS now fights one tier BELOW the finale so the climax actually feels like a climax. New dedicated RIFT FAILED summary screen (mirror of RIFT COMPLETE) — shows stops cleared, which node killed you, modules you keep, RETURN button. XP / PULSE / SURGE reward chips count up from 0 with ease-out cubic. Procedural confetti / spark burst plays behind the hero label on a successful clear. RIFTS mode is feature-complete. Windows only.
